reference: Hello Doctor, we are planning for the baby now, and it has been four months since we started trying and we haven't taken any precautions, so I would like to know the percentage chance of conceiving. Secondly, I would like to know how long it takes for the fluid to travel inside the female after intercourse. I have noticed that every time the fluid comes out, so I would like to know how the sperm remains inside and what is the normal timeframe. Also, is there any position that I need to maintain after intercourse so that the sperm flows in?
text: After we are planning for the baby now, and it has been four months since we started trying, and we haven't any precautions, so I would like to know the percentage chance of conceiving.
